message:
refactor: Consolidate MutatingMethods map for DCE

- Add MutatingMethods (list/dict/set mutation methods) to shared_maps.zig
- nested_captures.zig: Import from shared_maps
- analyzer.zig: Import as ListMethods from shared_maps
- lambda.zig: Import as ListMethodsMap from shared_maps

Net: -20 lines, better DCE from consolidated map
